creator: freebsd@ploum.eu
text:
Created attachment 232961
fr.bepo.kbd

Olivier Cochard is proposing to download the Bépo keymap for freebsd on his website :

https://olivier.cochard.me/bidouillage/installation-et-configuration-de-freebsd-comme-poste-de-travail


Note that the Bépo has been standardised by French normalisation AFNOR and is one of the two officials normalized French keyboard.

It should also be noted that the current disposition called "French.dvorak" is an old one made by Francis Leboutte and which was, at the time, not distributed under a free license (and was not included in Debian for that very reason).
